title: stevia bridgesii
intro: Stevia bridgesii, also known as Paraguayan sweet stevia or sweet stevia, is a species of the Stevia plant native to the subtropical regions of South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various digestive issues, such as diarrhea and upset stomach, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stevia bridgesii include lowering blood pressure, reducing blood sugar levels, and improving oral health due to its antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
